questionHtml: Determine the overall equation for the production of methanol.
markschemeHtml:
CH4(g) + H2O(g) ⇌ CH3OH(l) + H2(g) ✔

Accept arrow instead of equilibrium sign.

meta.title: Determine the overall equation for the production of methanol.
